*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Right buttock / Measures 5.3 cm x 4.5 cm / Stage: Stage 4
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Right buttock measures aprx 5.3 x 4.5cm, depth 3.0cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 3.2x2.7, 1.5cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
